what happened in work order number 8517-: Work order 8517-00 involved a geotechnical exploration for the Emergency Yasutake Bridge Replacement project in Wailua, Kauai, Hawaii. The bridge was closed to traffic due to scour and substructure issues. The investigation aimed to determine suitable foundation conditions for a temporary ACROW bridge.
why did work order number 8517-00 happen: Work order 8517-00 happened because the Yasutake Bridge was deemed unsafe and needed immediate replacement.
What happened at the Kapolei Storage Fue: The geotechnical exploration at the Kapolei Storage Fuel Tanks site revealed a potential for cavities and voids in the coral formation underlying the planned tank structures.  This prompted recommendations for proof-rolling finished subgrades and probing/grouting the foundation locations during construction to ensure the integrity of the tank foundations.
What happened at the Napili Sewer FOrce: The Napili Sewer Force Main Replacement project involved replacing or rehabilitating 3,000 linear feet of a 20-inch sewer force main. A new wet well structure was constructed, extending about 26 feet below the existing ground surface.
Why did they do that to the Napili Sewer: The Napili Sewer Force Main Replacement was done to address issues with the existing sewer force main, which was likely damaged, corroded, or outdated.
